_comment: Meta publishing configuration. Controls which platforms are active and sets formatting limits. All values are read by n8n workflows via $vars.META_PUBLISHING_CONFIG or directly from n8n Variables. Enable/disable toggles are the primary runtime control — set the corresponding n8n variables to override.

instagram._comment_enabled: Set ENABLE_META_INSTAGRAM=true in n8n Variables to activate Instagram publishing. Requires a Professional Account (Business or Creator) linked to a Facebook Page.
instagram._comment_story: Instagram story publishing requires the Instagram Graph API Content Publishing endpoint and a valid business account. Set ENABLE_META_INSTAGRAM_STORIES=true to activate.

facebook._comment_enabled: Set ENABLE_META_FACEBOOK=true in n8n Variables to activate Facebook Page publishing. Requires a Facebook Page and a Page Access Token with pages_manage_posts permission.
facebook._comment_story: Facebook story publishing requires the Facebook Graph API Pages Stories endpoint. Set ENABLE_META_FACEBOOK_STORIES=true to activate.

alert_story_threshold._comment: Only alerts with importance_score >= this value are eligible for Meta story generation. Keeps story volume manageable and quality high.

retry._comment: Retry settings for Meta API publish calls. Meta Graph API has rate limits; use exponential backoff in practice.

formatting._comment_cta: Default CTA appended when AI does not generate one. Can be overridden per topic in future config versions.
formatting._comment_topic_hashtags: Base topic hashtags always appended to AI-generated hashtags. Ensures minimum discoverability per topic.

instagram.token_type: User Access Token or Page-backed Instagram token
instagram.token_expiry: Long-lived tokens expire in 60 days — use token refresh logic or a system user token

facebook.token_expiry: Page Access Tokens derived from long-lived User Tokens do not expire if the Page has a valid connected app
